Description: "A cliffside view of Kelingking Beach in Nusa Penida, Bali. I chose it for the relaxing, amazing view and the peaceful feeling of looking over the bright blue water."
"Evening view of the Colosseum in Rome, glowing with lights. I chose it because it’s a famous place I’ve always wanted to see, and it makes me curious about the stories and history inside its walls."
"Morning view of the Maldives with a calm ocean and soft sunrise clouds. I chose it for the peaceful, very relaxing scene that simply makes me happy."
"Rain falling over the Kaaba in Mecca during the evening. I chose it for its peaceful beauty and the warm, happy feeling it gives me inside."

"A beautiful view of Niagara Falls in Canada with the water rushing down and touches of orange fall trees around it. I chose it because I visited before, and the magical, relaxing scene stayed with me."
"Sunset view of the Pyramids of Giza with a warm golden sky. I chose it because seeing one of the world’s greatest ancient wonders at sunset feels unforgettable."
"Snowy Zermatt with the Matterhorn towering above. I chose it for the fun of skiing, the amazing view of the Alps, and the stunning winter scenery."
"Hot-air balloons floating over Cappadocia at sunrise. I chose it for the unique adventure experience and the magical morning landscape."
"Rainy fall scene in Central Park with autumn trees while biking. I chose it because the fall colors and rainy atmosphere feel peaceful and nostalgic."
"Skydiving over Palm Jumeirah in Dubai. I chose it because the aerial view and adrenaline of jumping above the iconic island feel unforgettable."
